relations.note: Charts/tables use uniform 4-corner radius instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Adds within-email orientation consistency to the accent shape device.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair.

rules.intent: Enforce the signature brand container silhouette across containers, banners and callouts.
rules.rule_text: The brand accent shape is the core container device: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii while the other two corners keep a slight radius, used to house callout text and photography for a modern, optimistic read. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair and the small (6px email / 0.0625" print) radius to the other pair. Approved size pairs — email px at 96dpi: large 120px & 6px (accent_shape.radius.large_email), banner 48px & 6px (accent_shape.radius.banner_email), callout 42px & 6px (accent_shape.radius.callout_email); print: large 1.25" & 0.0625", banner 0.5" & 0.0625", small callout 0.4375" & 0.0625".

quotes: Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Prevent visually inconsistent corner orientation across sections of one email.
rules.rule_text: Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation for the accent shape across all sections. Default: large radius on the top-left & bottom-right corners.

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Keep tabular/chart containers legible with symmetric corners rather than the brand accent shape.
rules.rule_text: Exception to the accent shape: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (chart.container.radius = 12px uniform), NOT the asymmetric accent shape.
